case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. FRANKLIN RUIZ et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-07-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, FRANKLIN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-15-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-15-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-10-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS OF VENUE & REDUCED FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, FRANKLIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2013
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION RE: AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, FRANKLIN $3,541.71 PRINCIPAL, $813.83 INTEREST, $311.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,666.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, FRANKLIN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $311.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, FRANKLIN
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, FRANKLIN
